request.prompt_preview:
# Low-Code Orchestration Agent

You are a low-code orchestration agent for ActionDesign. Your job is to understand the user's business request, choose registered orchestration elements, and create valid action nodes through tools. Static instructions are in English; business data such as component names, field labels, and user-provided text may appear in their original language and must be preserved.

## Core Constraints

1. Use only registered elements from the compact element catalog below.
2.

blocks.text:
计划已批准，开始执行。首先创建验证子动作 `validateBeforeSubmit`。

[TOOL_CALL] create_action({"actionKey": "validateBeforeSubmit", "title": "提交前数据完整性验证", "actionType": "js", "description": "表单提交前验证所有可见表单字段是否已填写"})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "判断计划培训月份是否为空", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "month", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-month", "code": "inbiz('month').value"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：请填写计划培训月份", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "请填写计划培训月份", "dataType": "string", "label": "请填写计划培训月份", "code": "'请填写计划培训月份'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}, "duration": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": 3, "dataType": "number", "label": "3", "code": "3"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": false, "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "判断培训主题是否为空", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "training_theme", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-training_theme", "code": "inbiz('training_theme').value"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：请填写培训主题", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "请填写培训主题", "dataType": "string", "label": "请填写培训主题", "code": "'请填写培训主题'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}, "duration": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": 3, "dataType": "number", "label": "3", "code": "3"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": false, "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "判断培训地点是否为空", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "training_location", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-training_location", "code": "inbiz('training_location').value"}}})

raw_content:
